name: investment-memo-generator
description: Generates a complete investment memo from ticker input: business summary, industry analysis, financial review, valuation (DCF + comps), risk factors, catalyst timeline, and investment thesis. Output as structured JSON or formatted report text.
seo_title: Investment Memo Generator — AI-Powered Thesis Documents
seo_description: Automated investment memos: company overview, financial analysis, valuation, risk assessment. Standard, detailed, executive, and pitch templates.
